title: Premium Soap Dispenser Washing Up Brush with 9 X Refill | Washing Up Sponge with Handle Dish Brushes Sponge Scourer Refills
features: Refillable Soap-Dispensing Handle – Simply fill the handle with washing-up liquid; soap feeds through to the sponge for effortless cleaning as you scrub.
Includes 9 Long-Lasting Refill Sponges – Supplied with 9 durable replacement heads to keep your brush performing at its best for weeks.
Mess-Free and Efficient – Built to prevent leaks and overuse of soap, giving you a cleaner, more controlled washing-up experience.
Safe for All Surfaces – Non-scratch sponge heads clean effectively without damaging non-stick cookware, glass, or ceramic.
Comfortable, Ergonomic Design – Designed for ease of use with a grippy, lightweight handle that fits comfortably in your hand.
description: Make everyday washing-up quicker, cleaner, and easier with our Refillable Handle Soap Dish Brush – your all-in-one solution for scrubbing dishes, pans, and more. Designed with convenience and performance in mind, this clever tool features a built-in soap reservoir in the handle that gradually feeds washing-up liquid through to the sponge head as you clean—no buttons or squeezing needed. Each brush comes with 9 high-quality replacement sponges, built tough to tackle grease, grime, and baked-on food, yet gentle enough for non-stick cookware, glassware, and ceramics. The non-scratch heads give you powerful cleaning without risk of surface damage. With an ergonomic, anti-drip handle, this brush offers a comfortable grip and keeps your hands cleaner and drier during use. Simply unscrew the cap, fill with your favorite washing-up liquid, and let the brush do the work for you. Perfect for cleaning plates, pots, pans, oven trays, sinks, and more, this tool is a kitchen essential—saving you time, soap, and effort with every wash.
